Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel
Off Calendar Apr-26-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Keith Velleca, 415.293.8048 for 888 Seventh Street Owners Assoication.
Alan Wu (president) and Carla Leshne (board member) of 888 Sventh Street Owners Assoication.

Argued. Mr. Hu and Ms. Leshne state that they have had problems finding another lawyer since the trial date is set for July 2021. Mr. Velleca states that he informed the board that they should start looking for other counsel in March 2021.

The Court adopts the ruling as follows: DEFENDANT 888 SEVENTH STREET OWNERS ASSOCIATION's Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel is GRANTED. Order signed. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)
